claim_text: This NSFC run is a Tier C diagnostic boundary study against the official coordination score; it does not validate criterion performance.
confirmatory_status: not a strict preregistration validation claim
limitation: Gate -1 and Gate 0 PASS, but H4 primary high-support N=0; fallback only; official coordination score source is auto/rule report metric with exact formula unresolved; top-five subset restriction applies.
allowed_paper_wording: This NSFC run is a Tier C diagnostic boundary study against the official coordination score; it does not validate criterion performance.
forbidden_wording: Disallowed: validated criterion-validity framing; independently expert-validated endpoint framing; general NSFC/team-population validity; using fallback as main criterion evidence.

claim_text: State-conditioned diagnostics identify local exploratory strata for future validation; deployable use must abstain without exact support.
confirmatory_status: NOT EVALUABLE confirmatory; exploratory boundary only
limitation: No validated high-support outcome test is available; state-dependence phase is fallback-inclusive exploratory boundary only, with primary exact support N=0.
allowed_paper_wording: State-conditioned diagnostics identify local exploratory strata for future validation; deployable use must abstain without exact support.
forbidden_wording: Disallowed: confirmed state-conditioned validity; scalar-deviation defeat in NSFC; local fallback strata as global validity.

claim_text: D_comp and D_yield are correctly signed directional deviations and can be described as measurement-caliber predictors used in exploratory fallback analysis.
confirmatory_status: measurement/gate evidence only; superiority not confirmed
limitation: Gate 0 sign contract passes and D_comp/D_yield are non-degenerate, but H2 superiority over absolute/marginal/scalar alternatives is not validated in the primary high-support sample.
allowed_paper_wording: D_comp and D_yield are correctly signed directional deviations and can be described as measurement-caliber predictors used in exploratory fallback analysis.
forbidden_wording: Disallowed: proven directional IPV superiority; confirmatory directional findings; incremental novelty over the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline.

claim_text: No validated high-support incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic baseline; fallback is weak, uncertain, and exploratory.
confirmatory_status: Confirmatory family size=1; primary NOT EVALUABLE (N=0)
limitation: Primary high-support non-A1 collision-free N=0. Fallback LOTO delta_R2=+0.0093886895, CI [-0.0117879342, 0.0419586555], p=0.23046875; LOSO delta_R2=-0.0049266258.
allowed_paper_wording: No validated high-support incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic baseline; fallback is weak, uncertain, and exploratory.
forbidden_wording: Disallowed: validated incremental utility; robust held-out increment; fallback rescues H4; zero-effect proof.

claim_text: H3 materials are prepared only; the mechanism claim is blocked until real blind labels are collected and locked.
limitation: annotation_status.json reports BLOCKED: no real independent two-annotator behavioral labels, no inter-rater agreement, no event-IPV test.
allowed_paper_wording: H3 materials are prepared only; the mechanism claim is blocked until real blind labels are collected and locked.
forbidden_wording: Disallowed: supported blind behavioral mechanism; simulated labels as evidence; complete ground truth; mechanism evidence used in Tier basis.

claim_text: Matched opportunity structure screen; descriptive boundary evidence only; no post-exposure matching used.
confirmatory_status: BLOCKED for stronger NPC effect-identification claims
limitation: NPC report: script-version and seed fields unavailable; only pre-exposure observed variables available; stronger pre-exposure matching is non-identifiable.
allowed_paper_wording: Matched opportunity structure screen; descriptive boundary evidence only; no post-exposure matching used.
forbidden_wording: Disallowed: identical-input NPC claim; NPC effect-identification claim; design-equivalence NPC test; post-treatment trajectory matching.

claim_text: Exact role-context support gap under the frozen InterHub key; not a blanket absence of theta/state/progress overlap; IPV itself is non-degenerate and not reducible to the frozen baseline.
limitation: Stat review and red team: NSFC role contexts A/B/C have zero exact InterHub role-context matches; exact 4-key intersections=0; three-key intersections ignoring role_context=57/57; all primary active frames abstain.
allowed_paper_wording: Exact role-context support gap under the frozen InterHub key; not a blanket absence of theta/state/progress overlap; IPV itself is non-degenerate and not reducible to the frozen baseline.
forbidden_wording: Disallowed: successful domain transfer; transferable InterHub-calibrated coverage guarantees on NSFC; no InterHub analog at all; domain gap proves no effect.
